0100000111100101 1001000100111110 1 -> sum: 1101001100100100, cout: 0

0001010111010000 0110111010111010 0 -> sum: 1000010010001010, cout: 0
1111100111011100 1001011011100001 1 -> sum: 1001000010111110, cout: 1
0001010011010000 1000010110011000 0 -> sum: 1001101001101000, cout: 0
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0
1111111111111111 1111111111111111 1 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 1
0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
